thought.text: 现在添加函数参数列表：

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4", "old_str": "functionDefinition
    : declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator LeftParen RightParen compoundStatement
    ;", "new_str": "parameterList
    :   parameterDeclaration (Comma parameterDeclaration)*
    ;

parameterDeclaration
    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
    ;

functionDefinition
    : declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator LeftParen (parameterList? | identifierList?) RightParen compoundStatement
    ;", "summary": "添加函数参数列表"}
